text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Hello, Nanny? I've a special favor to ask of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, my favorite brand of skin toner has
been discontinued...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've tried using a substitute, but it's made my skin
red and tingly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Even minor rashes should be taken seriously.
...Left unattended, a torn seam will end up a
gaping hole.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan seems concerned about her skin
irritation...
